previous_candidacies.outcome: Won with 93% (799 votes) over write-in candidate Wendy Denton

criminal_and_law_enforcement_record.open_source_review_conclusion: No records found in open-source review. Clean criminal record as of research date.

about_public_record.about_summary_narrative:
Harvey Fox is the Secretary of the Harleton ISD Board of Trustees, serving Place 3 since November 2018. Born October 1945, he is currently 80 years old.

Fox won his seat in 2018 with an overwhelming 93% of the vote (799 votes) over write-in candidate Wendy Denton. His minimal public footprint makes substantive analysis difficult at this stage.

Possible relatives Amy L. Fox and Martha L. Fox appear in public records aggregators but their specific relationship to Harvey Fox has not been confirmed.

No negative public-record items have surfaced in open-source review as of this research date.

summary: Harvey Fox is the Secretary of Harleton ISD (Place 3). Born October 1945 (age 80). Won 2018 with 93% (799 votes) over write-in Wendy Denton. Minimal public footprint. Clean criminal record in open-source review. On the November 2026 ballot. Possible relatives Amy L. Fox and Martha L. Fox per public records.
analyst_notes: Fox is a minimal-footprint trustee. The 93% victory in 2018 suggests deep community entrenchment or simply no organized opposition. At 80, the question is whether he will seek another 4-year term in November 2026 or retire. If he does not run, Place 3 becomes an open seat, which changes the competitive dynamics entirely. Priority next moves: confirm 2026 filing status (this is the single most important data point), pull Harrison CAD property records, pull voter roll primary history, check if Amy L. Fox or Martha L. Fox have any district connections, locate any social media or community presence.
research_gaps: Confirm 2026 filing status (will Fox seek reelection at age 80?)
Harrison County voter roll primary history
Confirm relationship to Amy L. Fox and Martha L. Fox
Locate any social media or community presence
Harleton ISD board meeting minutes for attendance and vote patterns
Campaign finance filings for 2018 and 2026 cycles
